discovery.text: Beloved Gastown brunch spot by day, transforms into Breeze cocktail bar Wed-Sun evenings. French-inspired comfort food. Heritage Carrall Street location. Perfect for Friday arrival brunch or dinner. Rating 4.5/5 (1,982 reviews). $$. Featured in Eater Vancouver's 38 Best.
